title: Seeing is Believing
scenario: Create a visually engaging brochure for a new optical store. The brochure should highlight the store's advanced technology and expertise. It should be designed to appeal to a wide range of age groups. The brochure should include at least three visual elements showcasing the store's services.
constraints: Must use at least three visual elements (images, charts, etc.)

evaluationCriteria.description: The brochure should have a visually appealing design, including a mix of colors and fonts.
The Flesch-Kincaid readability test score should be between 60-70.
The brochure should meet the word count and visual element constraints.
